user.title: OwnerRez API Credentials
user.description: Enter your OwnerRez login email, API token (found under Settings → API in OwnerRez), and the Property ID you want to manage.

locks.title: Lock & Notification Configuration
locks.description: Enter your lock entity IDs exactly as they appear in Home Assistant (e.g. lock.front_door). Comma-separate multiple locks and their matching code slots.

data.primary_lock: Primary Lock Entity (used for arrival detection)
data.checkin_buffer_minutes: Minutes before check-in to activate code

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials — check your email and API token.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach the OwnerRez API — check your internet connection and property ID.

abort.already_configured: OwnerRez Lock Manager is already configured for this property.
